title: LLM-INSTRUCT at UZH Shared Task 2026: Constraint-Aware Retrieval and Selective Debate for Paragraph-Level Argument Mining
abstract: Winning system for the UZH Shared Task 2026 on paragraph-level argument mining in UN and UNESCO resolutions. Using open-weight models limited to 8B parameters, the approach combines constraint-aware retrieval with a selective multi-agent debate to identify argumentative paragraphs and predict argumentative relations.

title: SCoRe: Smoothed Certified Release for Prompt Repair

venue: Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research (JAIR) · Q1
